---
name: ⚡ Performance Issue
about: Report performance problems (slow loading, low FPS)
title: '[PERF] '
labels: performance
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the performance issue**
A clear and concise description of the performance problem.

**Repo Details**
- Repository: [e.g. facebook/react, or your repo]
- File Count: [e.g. 100, 500, 1000+]
- Load Time: [e.g. 5s, 30s, timeout]
- FPS: [e.g. 60, 30, <20]

**Environment:**
- OS: [e.g. Windows, macOS, Linux]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121]
- RAM: [e.g. 8GB, 16GB, 32GB]
- GPU: [e.g. Integrated, NVIDIA RTX 3080]

**Steps to Reproduce**
1. Go to '...'
2. Load repo '...'
3. Observe performance issue

**Expected Performance**
What performance did you expect? (e.g. 60fps, <5s load)

**Actual Performance**
What performance did you get? (e.g. 20fps, 30s load)

**Screenshots/Recordings**
If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings.

**Console Performance Profile**
If possible, attach a Chrome DevTools performance profile.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the performance issue here.
